commit_scope: Promote the Form-first reasoning sovereignty gate from a local experiment into committed config so the substrate-before-rented-mind discipline travels to local and cloud/phone Claude Code and Codex. Adds a docs/coherence-substrate teaching, a directive in CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md (both read natively on every surface), and committed session hooks for Claude (.claude/settings.json) and Codex (.codex/hooks.json). No kernel/runtime files touched; no Form proof bands run.
evidence_refs: JSON parse: .claude/settings.json, .claude/settings.local.json, .codex/hooks.json all load OK after edits

Offline backend proof: python3 scripts/coh_substrate.py ingest docs/vision-kb/concepts/lc-cognitive-sovereignty.md -> [concept] cell_id=406 blueprint=1.7.4.1; then python3 scripts/coh_substrate.py form '@concept(lc-cognitive-sovereignty)' -> blueprint=@1.7.4.1 with no network (the same cell the production door returned 404 for)

Production read door populated: GET /api/substrate/lattice/stats -> blueprints_total=884, recipes_total=26696, cells_total=5311; GET /api/substrate/cell/concept/lc-cross-modal-unity -> blueprint 1.7.4.5, cell_id 91093; GET /api/substrate/equivalent/concept/lc-cross-modal-unity -> shape-family lc-each-breath-whole, lc-sovereignty-within-oneness, lc-form-perceptron

Platform reach verified against current docs: cloud Claude Code runs committed .claude/settings.json hooks (no gatekeeping) and honors committed CLAUDE.md; settings.local.json is gitignored and ignored in cloud; default egress allowlist does not include api.coherencycoin.com (needs Full/Custom or ingest-at-setup). Codex cloud reads AGENTS.md before any work, runs project .codex/ hooks only when the project is trusted, and blocks internet during the agent phase while allowing it during the setup script (so ingest-at-setup is the sovereign fit).
Local experiment in .claude/settings.local.json reverted to its original BML-first-only state; committed config is now the single source.

Live demo of the gate: structural query answered from the substrate with attributed NodeID and zero remote reasoning; non-structural query (write a function) correctly recorded as a miss that escalates to remote.

ci_validation.notes: Docs and agent-config change; no kernel proof bands apply. CI has not run yet for this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: Changes are agent-orientation docs and session hooks; no public HTTP endpoint or service changes, so there is no production deploy to verify. The behavior reaches users when they pull the repo into a local or cloud/phone agent session.

phase_gate.reason: Local verification passed; CI and merge remain pending. No deploy applies to this docs/config change.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A fresh clone opened in local or cloud/phone Claude Code or Codex now carries the Form-first directive in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md and a committed session-start hook, so the agent asks the Form substrate before spending remote reasoning, relays a grounded NodeID hit attributed and stops, and escalates to remote only on a miss.
public_endpoints: none changed; the public substrate read doors used as a backend already exist
test_flows: Offline sovereign backend: ingest a concept locally, then query it from the local lattice with no network, returning the cell blueprint.
Networked backend: production substrate read doors return cell metadata and shape-family for an ingested concept.
Directive travel: CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md carry the gate and are read natively by both agents on local and cloud/phone surfaces.
